ddls:
CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type categorization of the feature (e.g., General, Metamagic) */,
  "multiple" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the feature can be taken multiple times */,
  "stack" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the feature can stack with others */,
  "choice" TEXT /* Any choice associated with the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature's mechanics */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites required to take the feature */,
  "benefit" TEXT /* Benefits granted by the feature */,
  "normal" TEXT /* Normal conditions applicable to the feature */,
  "special" TEXT /* Special conditions applicable to the feature */,
  "full_text" TEXT /* Full text description of the feature */,
  "reference" TEXT /* Reference linking to source material */,
  "effect" TEXT /* Effects of the feature (e.g., damage, healing, or stat changes) */,
  "activation" TEXT /* How the feature is activated (e.g., by level, by choice, or by trigger) */,
  "deactivation" TEXT /* How the feature is deactivated (e.g., by level, by choice, or by trigger) */,
  "dependencies" TEXT /* Dependencies the feature has on other features or game mechanics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature type (e.g., General, Metamagic) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature type */,
  "parent_type_id" INTEGER /* Parent type (if any) to create a hierarchical structure for feature types */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prerequisites" (
  "prerequisite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prerequisite */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feature it applies to */,
  "requirement" TEXT /* Description of the prerequisite requirement */,
  "prerequisite_type" TEXT /* Type of prerequisite (e.g., level, skill, or feat) */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the prerequisite (e.g., level 5 or skill rank 10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prerequisite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prerequisites_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feature that provides the benefit */,
  "benefit_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the benefit */,
  "benefit_type" TEXT /* Type of benefit (e.g., damage, healing, or stat changes) */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the benefit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benefits_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feature it applies to */,
  "condition_type" TEXT /* Type of condition (normal or special) */,
  "condition_description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "condition-trigger" TEXT /* Trigger for the condition (e.g., by level, by choice, or by event) */,
  "condition-duration" TEXT /* Duration of the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conditions_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "full_texts" (
  "full_text_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each full text entry */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feature it describes */,
  "text" TEXT /* Full text description of the feature */,
  "description-format" TEXT /* Format of the description (e.g., plain text, HTML, or Markdown) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("full_text_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_full_texts_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "references" (
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference entry */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feature it belongs to */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source material for the feature */,
  "reference-url" TEXT /* URL of the reference (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_references_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feature that the feedback is about */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (1 to 5) */,
  "feedback-type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., suggestion, bug report, or general comment) */,
  "suggestion" TEXT /* Suggested changes or improvements */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, tester) */,
  "experience-points" INTEGER /* User's experience points */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage entry */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feature used */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who used the feature */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Count of how many times the feature was used */,
  "usage-context" TEXT /* Context of usage (e.g., combat, exploration, or role-playing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_usage_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_usage_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_usage_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "session_name" TEXT /* Name of the session */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the session was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)
